mapper.select: select * from t_r_ai_metadata_sync_config where datasource_id = #{datasourceId} limit 1
select * from t_r_ai_metadata_sync_config order by updated_at desc
select * from t_r_ai_metadata_sync_config order by updated_at desc
select * from t_r_ai_metadata_sync_config where enabled = 1 and schedule_cron is not null and schedule_cron <> ''
